vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Subsystem module: Center Body Pod (fixed BOM item inside Long-Range Surveillance Wing)
Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear
Vehicle context: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance
Discipline: Actuation - role: Motor pod / pusher prop mount dummy with bolt pattern and cooling path (non-operational)

verify.rule: Ensure all necessary fields are included.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on the wing spar reinforcement due to sun exposure.
risk.mit: Implement thermal insulation and conductive materials in the reinforcement area.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow reaching the motor pod.
risk.mit: Optimize cooling inlet design and position for better airflow.

risk.desc: Possibility of human error during assembly due to complex bolt patterns.
risk.mit: Provide detailed assembly instructions and training for personnel.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate structural support for the equipment bay door hinge.
risk.mit: Reinforce the hinge area with additional stiffeners or ribs.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues with the motor mount due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Use precision manufacturing techniques and tighter tolerances.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Structural loads transferred from wing to motor pod
Airflow for cooling the motor pod
Thermal management from sun exposure to equipment bay
Motion due to wing flexure affecting pod structure
Human access to equipment bay for maintenance

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate sensors into the pod structure for monitoring structural integrity and environmental conditions
Incorporate power distribution lines within the pod to supply power to various components
Embed data communication pathways for transmitting telemetry and control signals between different subsystems

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection for dimensional accuracy and surface finish

verification_focus.description: Verify the mass of the center body pod against the budgeted mass of 1200g
Confirm the structural integrity of the wing spar reinforcement under expected loading conditions
Validate the cooling efficiency of the motor pod through airflow simulation
